title: Kajabi - api data pull

posts.author: jennyvaz (Jenny Vaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to pull data from Kajabi. We run our membership program and track workflow using Monday + Slack as the communication system. Was wondering if anyone had a way of pulling specific data (e.g. tag = ‘xyz’) from the contact in Kajabi onto a Monday board? I’ve tried automately and zapier w. zero success.

Thank you
Jenny
